info.name: Factset Get Accounts and Sub-directories in a Directory

params.name: path
params.description: The directory to get the accounts and sub-directories in

items.docs: This endpoint looks up all ACCT and ACTM files and sub-directories in a given directory.

params.name: name
params.description: Column name

params.name: category
params.description: Column category

params.name: directory
params.description: The directory to get the columns in

items.docs: This endpoint lists all the PA columns that can be applied to a calculation.

params.name: id
params.description: Unique identifier for a column

items.docs: This endpoint returns the default settings of a PA column.
This endpoint lists all the column statistics that can be applied to a PA column.

params.name: document
params.description: Document Name

items.docs: This endpoint returns the list of PA components in a given PA document.

info.name: Factset Get Pa Component by Id

params.name: id
params.description: Unique identifier for a PA component

items.docs: This endpoint returns the default settings of a PA component.
This endpoint lists all the currencies that can be applied to any calculation.

info.name: Factset Convert Pa Dates to Absolute Format

params.name: startdate
params.description: Start Date

params.name: enddate
params.description: End Date

params.name: componentid
params.description: Component Id

params.name: account
params.description: Account ( Account Name ending with .ACCT or .ACTM )

items.docs: This endpoint converts the given start and end dates in FactSet date format to yyyymmdd format for a PA calculation. For more information on FactSet date format, please refer to the PA Engine API documentation under the 'API Documentation' section in the developer portal.

info.name: Factset Get Pa3 Documents and Sub-directories in a Directory

params.name: path
params.description: The directory to get the documents and sub-directories in

items.docs: This endpoint looks up all PA3 documents and sub-directories in a given directory.
This endpoint lists all the frequencies that can be applied to a PA calculation.
This endpoint lists all the PA groups that can be applied to a PA calculation.
This endpoint lists all the PA grouping frequencies that can be applied to a PA calculation.

params.name: directory
params.description: Get linked PA templates in path.

params.name: documentDirectory
params.description: Get linked PA templates for documents in document path

params.name: documentName
params.description: Get linked PA templates for documents by document name

items.docs: This endpoint returns the list of linked PA templates in given path.

info.name: Factset Create a Linked Pa Template

items.docs:
This endpoint creates a template from an **existing portfolio analysis tile**, allowing the user to replicate and fetch reports settings.

Remarks:

*   Mandatory fields are required to be passed in POST requests and Optional fields are not necessary. 
    If no mandatory fields are passed, then we can use the template as a component and skip the component creation.
    
*   Mandatory, optional and locked fields can be  "accounts", "benchmarks", "groups", "columns", "datasources", "dates"

info.name: Factset Get Linked Pa Template by Id

params.name: id
params.description: Unique identifier for a linked PA template

items.docs: This endpoint fetches the linked PA template settings.

info.name: Factset Update a Linked Pa Template

params.name: id
params.description: Unique identifier for a linked PA template

items.docs:
This endpoint allows the user to change the request body and description from an existing template.

Remarks:

*   Mandatory fields are required to be passed in POST requests and Optional fields are not necessary. 
    If no mandatory fields are passed, then we can use the template as a component and skip the component creation.
    
*   Mandatory, optional and locked fields can be  "accounts", "benchmarks", "groups", "columns", "datasources", "dates", "currencyisocode" and "componentdeta

info.name: Factset Delete a Linked Pa Template.

params.name: id
params.description: Unique identifier for a linked PA template

items.docs: This endpoint deletes an existing linked PA template.
This endpoints returns all calculation requests.

info.name: Factset Create and Run Pa Calculation

items.docs:
This endpoint runs the PA calculation specified in the POST body parameters.
It can take one or more calculation units as input.

Remarks:

*	Any settings in POST body will act as a one-time override over the settings saved in the PA template.

*   Account identifiers must have .ACCT or .ACTM extension or BENCH: prefix. Holdings mode can be optionally set for every account. 
    Possible values for holdings mode are B&H (Buy and Hold), TBR (Transaction based returns), OMS (Order Manageme

info.name: Factset Get Pa Calculation Parameters by Id

params.name: id
params.description: from url, provided from the location header in the Create and Run PA calculation endpoint

items.docs: This is the endpoint that returns the calculation parameters passed for a calculation.

info.name: Factset Create or Update Pa Calculation and Run It.

params.name: id
params.description: from url, provided from the location header in the Create and Run PA calculation endpoint

items.docs:
This endpoint updates and run the PA calculation specified in the PUT body parameters. This also allows creating new PA calculations with custom ids.
It can take one or more calculation units as input.

Remarks:

*	Any settings in PUT body will act as a one-time override over the settings saved in the PA template.

*   Account identifiers must have .ACCT or .ACTM extension or BENCH: prefix. Holdings mode can be optionally set for every account. 
    Possible values for holdings mode are

info.name: Factset Cancel Pa Calculation by Id

params.name: id
params.description: from url, provided from the location header in the Create and Run PA calculation endpoint

items.docs: This is the endpoint to cancel a previously submitted calculation.

info.name: Factset Get Pa Calculation Status by Id

params.name: id
params.description: from url, provided from the location header in the Create and Run PA calculation endpoint

items.docs:
This is the endpoint to check on the progress of a previously requested calculation.
If the calculation has finished computing, the location header will point to the result url.
Otherwise, the calculation is still running and the X-FactSet-Api-PickUp-Progress header will contain a progress percentage.

info.name: Factset Get Pa Calculation Result by Id

params.name: id
params.description: from url, provided from the location header in the Get PA calculation status by id endpoint

params.name: unitId
params.description: from url, provided from the location header in the Get PA calculation status by id endpoint

items.docs:
This is the endpoint to get the result of a previously requested calculation.
If the calculation has finished computing, the body of the response will contain the requested document in JSON.

params.description: Get templated PA components in path

items.docs: This endpoint returns the list of templated PA components in path.

This endpoint creates new component based off of linked PA template or unlinked PA template.

Remarks:

*   Any settings in the POST body will act as a one-time override over the settings saved in the PA template.

*   Account identifiers must have .ACCT or .ACTM extension or BENCH: prefix. Holdings mode can be optionally set for every account. 
    Possible values for holdings mode are B&H (Buy and Hold), TBR (Transaction based returns), OMS (Order Management System), 
    VLT (Vaulted

This endpoint creates a template which is not linked to any specific PA3 tile. 

Remarks:
